items.title: Colombia 1 Ghana 0: Wolves flop sets up World Cup last-16 clash against Switzerland
items.summary: JAMES RODRIGUEZ’S World Cup career lives on - despite being subbed off at half-time.  The Colombian playmaker, 34, shone at the 2014 tournament with his sensational volley helping him to the Golden Boot. But on his record-equalling 130th cap, he struggled to make an impact in the final last-32

items.title: Jhon Arias goal sends Colombia into last 16 as Ghana bow out of World Cup
items.summary: Ghana can only have feared the worst when Luis Suárez’s number came up in the seventh minute. A day on from the 16th anniversary of one of the most infamous episodes in World Cup history, the Colombia forward who shares a name with the man whose handball broke the hearts of Black Stars supporters in

items.title: England stars heckled as they arrive at Mexico City hotel to hostile reception after secret World Cup location is LEAKED
items.summary: ENGLAND'S World Cup stars were given a hostile reception as they arrived at their Mexico City hotel ahead of facing the tournament co-hosts. The Three Lions only found out their last-16 tie at the Estadio Azteca will kick-off at 1am UK time just before boarding their flight from Kansas City. The tim

items.title: Lionel Messi left with huge bump on forehead after being kneed in the face in World Cup thriller vs Cape Verde
items.summary: LIONEL MESSI finished the Cape Verde thriller with a horror bruise swelling up on his forehead. The evergreen 39-year-old finished up black-and-blue by the end of the magnificent 3-2 win, following a late knee to the nut. After scoring the opener - his seventh of the tournament so far - the Barcelon

items.title: ‘I feel like crying’ – Man Utd star Lisandro Martinez makes emotional statement about his daughter after World Cup goal
items.summary: LISANDRO MARTINEZ says he may not have got through his injury hell at Manchester United without the birth of his daughter. The defender, 28, found the net as Argentina avoided a humiliating World Cup upset against minnows Cape Verde. The defending champions wrapped up a 3-2 win after extra-time - de

items.title: Arias strike sends Colombia into World Cup last 16
items.summary: Colombia reached the last 16 of the World Cup for the third time in their last three appearances at the tournament with a 1-0 win over Ghana.

items.title: Farewell Cape Verde - the underdogs the World Cup will never forget
items.summary: Cape Verde may have been the World Cup's smallest nation but they leave the largest impact as they depart following defeat by defending champions Argentina in an epic.

items.title: Arias strike sends Colombia into last 16 with victory over Ghana
items.summary: Jhon Arias scores the only goal of the game as Colombia become the last team to book their place in the last 16 following a 1-0 win over Ghana in Kansas City.
